test.name: replication node rejoin after cluster added \ droped table

queries.sphinxql: join cluster a at '%addr_connect%' '%cluster_path%' as path;
join cluster a at '%addr_connect%' '%cluster_path%' as path;
join cluster b at '%addr_connect%' '%cluster_path%' as path;
ALTER CLUSTER a DROP t; ALTER CLUSTER b ADD t;
show status like 'cluster_a_status'; show status like 'cluster_a_node_state';
show status like 'cluster_a_status'; show status like 'cluster_a_node_state';
